mapper.insert: insert into query_answer_citations ( audit_id, claim_id, citation_ordinal, citation_literal, source_type, target_key, validation_status, validated_by, overlap_score, matched_excerpt, reason ) values ( #{record.auditId}, #{record.claimId}, #{record.citationOrdinal}, #{record.literal}, #{record.sourceType}, #{record.targetKey}, #{record.status}, #{record.validatedBy}, #{record.overlapScore}, #{record.matchedExcerpt}, #{record.reason} )
